scripts.e2e: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright test
scripts.e2e:ui: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright test --ui
scripts.e2e:headed: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.e2e:debug: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright test --debug
scripts.e2e:chrome: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:firefox: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright test --project=firefox
scripts.e2e:webkit: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright test --project=webkit
scripts.e2e:all: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright test --project=chromium --project=firefox --project=webkit
scripts.e2e:codegen: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright codegen http://localhost:3000
